task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in with the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Odoo dashboard or application menu indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile icon or main app menu visible).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Calendar application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Odoo Calendar interface, showing a daily, weekly, or monthly calendar view.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting is set for Friday of the upcoming week at 14:00 (2:00 PM) for 1 hour.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the meeting creation form or calendar selection. The start time must be 14:00 (2:00 PM) and the end time must be 15:00 (3:00 PM) on a Friday.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting is named 'Project Sync'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Project Sync' entered into the meeting subject or title field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct location is selected based on availability.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Location' field in the meeting details form. It must be filled with either 'Board Room' or 'Engineering Lab'.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting was successfully scheduled and appears on the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Project Sync' event block successfully displayed on the main calendar grid at the Friday 14:00 time slot.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with Odoo.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window showing the Odoo interface. The agent should not be using terminal commands (like curl or python scripts) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard Odoo UI elements (buttons, modals, calendar grids). The inputs should not be typed into a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the final result is genuine and not visually spoofed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the calendar event looks like a native Odoo calendar block without signs of browser developer tools manipulation (e.g., mismatched fonts, misaligned text, or floating elements).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The meeting must be named exactly 'Project Sync'. It must be scheduled for 14:00 (2:00 PM) with a duration of exactly 1.0 hour (ending at 15:00). The location must be 'Board Room' unless there is a conflicting event at that time, in which case it must be 'Engineering Lab'.
